fact_nuggets.text: Battery redirects here. For the held item, see Cell Battery. Battery (Japanese: Battery) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. It is the signature Ability of Charjabug.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability increases the Special Attack of allies when they use special moves by approximately 30%, or more precisely, 5325/4096. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Battery has no effect outside of battle.
In battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability increases the Special Attack of allies when they use special moves by approximately 30%, or more precisely, 5325/4096.
Ally Pokemon's moves have their power increased to 1.3.
Boosts allies' Special Attack on special moves
